questions.question: Who issues UK Amateur Radio licences?
questions.reason: Ofcom is the UK communications regulator and is responsible for issuing UK Amateur Radio licences.

questions.question: What is the minimum age to hold a UK Foundation Amateur Radio licence?
questions.reason: There is no minimum age requirement for holding a UK Foundation licence.

questions.question: What does your callsign identify when you transmit?
questions.reason: A callsign uniquely identifies the licensed station/operator using the transmission.
